golden_cases.notes: Validated Carnival map state with the merchant commission entry visible.
Merchant commission detail modal before auto-path begins.
Merchant group list where the Meow Group commission can be accepted.
Preferred left-task-list round entry after one Meow Group commission is already accepted.
Item submit panel when the target item is already visible or partially owned.
Item submit panel when the inventory is empty and the task must branch to immediate buy.
Immediate-buy confirmation dialog for the missing Meow Group round quantity.
Updated left-task-list round after one submission succeeds and the loop advances.

steps.success_condition: The fixed Poring -> Carnival -> Merchant Commission route reaches the commission detail modal truthfully.
steps.failure_condition: The validated fixed-UI entry route cannot reach the merchant commission detail modal.
steps.notes: This slice stays inside the validated fixed-UI city route only.

steps.success_condition: The merchant group list is visible and the Meow Group commission can be accepted without probing other merchant groups.
steps.failure_condition: The Meow Group commission card is not visible or the route drifts into another merchant group.
steps.notes: Do not widen this slice to any non-Meow merchant group.

steps.success_condition: The accepted commission is re-entered through the left `[日常] 商會委託` task-list route.
steps.failure_condition: The accepted commission cannot be resumed from the validated task-list route.
steps.notes: Re-entry should prefer the task-list path instead of reopening Carnival every round.

steps.success_condition: The active round truthfully chooses direct submit or immediate-buy-then-submit from the validated submit panel.
steps.failure_condition: No truthful bounded hand-in action can be selected from the Meow Group submit panel.
steps.notes: This slice allows `立即購買` but still forbids crafting, gathering, or pathing.

steps.success_condition: The round advances to the next `[日常] 商會委託(n/10)` state after submission.
steps.failure_condition: The round result cannot be verified from the updated task list or submit flow surfaces.
steps.notes: Only the validated Meow Group round progression contract is in scope.

do_not_click_notes: Do not use the top-right line-switch arrow near the minimap as the merchant entry.
Do not reopen Carnival for every round after one Meow Group commission is already accepted.
Do not widen the route to any non-Meow merchant group.
merchant_commission_meow_route_contract.notes: Validated route stays inside the fixed Poring -> Carnival entry and the preferred left task-list re-entry loop.

merchant_commission_meow_loop_contract.notes: The validated Meow Group loop is a semi-fixed 10-round material hand-in chain with immediate-buy support.

merchant_commission_meow_submission_poli.notes: The first delivery slice may buy missing materials from the validated submit panel, but it must not widen into crafting, gathering, or other merchant-group routes.

merchant_commission_meow_decision_contra.notes: The round resolver only chooses among the validated submit, immediate-buy-then-submit, or stop-for-operator outcomes.

notes: Specification-only blueprint for the bounded `商會委託 -> 喵手商團` first delivery slice.

task_manifest.entry_condition: The account is on the validated main-city UI route and can reach Merchant Commission through the fixed Poring -> Carnival entry.
task_manifest.failure_condition: The Meow Group route leaves the validated fixed-UI entry, cannot re-enter through the left task list, or cannot verify round progression honestly.
task_manifest.name: Merchant Commission (Meow Group)

stop_conditions.message: Merchant commission meow fixture exceeded task-side timeout.
Operator stop should abort merchant commission meow immediately.
Expected Meow Group merchant commission anchors did not match stable UI.

task_manifest.success_condition: The task truthfully reaches the validated Meow Group round hand-in loop and can verify round progression after submission.
